```{=html}
<section class="core-themes" aria-label="Focus areas links">
  <div class="core-grid">
    <a class="core-card vss-card-link" href="basicright.qmd">
      <div class="core-icon"><i class="bi bi-shield-check" aria-hidden="true"></i></div>
      <h4>Basic Rights</h4>
      <p>Supporting access to entitlements, services, and rights awareness.</p>
    </a>

    <a class="core-card vss-card-link" href="livelihood.qmd">
      <div class="core-icon"><i class="bi bi-tree-fill" aria-hidden="true"></i></div>
      <h4>Livelihood</h4>
      <p>Strengthening incomes through skills, planning, and local opportunities.</p>
    </a>

    <a class="core-card vss-card-link" href="disaster.qmd">
      <div class="core-icon"><i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill" aria-hidden="true"></i></div>
      <h4>Disaster Management</h4>
      <p>Preparedness, resilience, and community response to disasters.</p>
    </a>

    <a class="core-card vss-card-link" href="capacity.qmd">
      <div class="core-icon"><i class="bi bi-mortarboard-fill" aria-hidden="true"></i></div>
      <h4>Capacity Building</h4>
      <p>Training and mentoring to strengthen institutions and leadership.</p>
    </a>
  </div>
</section>
```
